headline: Arista Networks Positioned as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Enterprise Wired and Wireless LAN
summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., May 20, 2026--Arista Networks (NYSE: ANET), a leader in data-driven, client-to-cloud networking, today announced it has been named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant for Enterprise Wired and Wireless LAN.1 This recognition, we feel, highlights Arista’s continued momentum in the enterprise campus, driven by its unified, software-driven approach to networking and its commitment to delivering modern, reliable, and AI-optimized connectivity from the data center to the

headline: 5 Stocks With High ROE to Profit as Markets Skid on Tech Slump

headline: Can Proliferating WaveLogic 6 Adoption Fuel Ciena's Top Line?
summary: CIEN's WL6e powers 1 Tb/s submarine transmission in Southeast Asia as AI-driven network demand fuels customer growth and expansion.

headline: How The AI Data Center Story Is Reframing Arista Networks (ANET) Valuation And Expectations
summary: Arista Networks just saw its modeled fair value price target updated to US$188.20 from US$180.33, a modest reset that gives you a fresh reference point for the stock. This shift sits against an analyst narrative that leans positive on Ethernet based AI data centers and AI heavy networking demand, while still flagging execution and valuation risk. As you read on, you will see how this new target fits into the evolving story and what to watch as sentiment moves. Stay updated as the Fair Value...
